mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (customer_id, status, total_price) VALUES (#{customerId}, #{status}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, customer_id AS customerId, status, total_price AS totalPrice FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, customer_id AS customerId, status, total_price AS totalPrice FROM orders WHERE customer_id = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_item (order_id, product_id, quantity, unit_price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id AS orderId, product_id AS productId, quantity, unit_price AS unitPrice FROM order_item WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
